top_signals.title: Congo faces surge in Ebola cases as key medical tools run short
top_signals.summary: The outbreak is caused by the rare Bundibugyo strain of the virus and has no approved vaccine or antibody treatment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
